items.headline: Karren Brady steps down as West Ham vice-chair after 16 years
items.description: Baroness Karren Brady has stepped down from her position as vice-chair of West Ham United after 16 years at the club.

items.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Man United eye Real Madrid star as Casemiro replacement
items.description: Manchester United have added Real Madrid midfielder Aurélien Tchouaméni to their shortlist. Join us for the latest transfer news and rumors from around the globe.

items.headline: Lawrence Okolie returns 'adverse' drug test ahead of Tony Yoka clash
items.description: British heavyweight Lawrence Okolie has failed a Voluntary Anti-Doping Association (VADA) drugs test, five days out from his scheduled bout against Tony Yoka, Queensberry Promotions have confirmed.

items.headline: Is a new Premier League ball helping with long-range goals?
items.description: Teams aren't taking as many long-range shots this season, but they're still scoring stunning goals from distance. Is a change in the Premier League match ball responsible?

items.headline: Powerplay podcast: Edwards' era
items.description: Charlotte Edwards reflects on her first year as England Women's head coach and looks ahead to a home T20 World Cup
